scripts.title: Intro
scripts.content:
Hey Dr. [NAME]?

Hey Dr. [NAME], this is Rose, and I’m calling from [COMPANY]. I’m reaching out because we work with practices to improve the way they connect with prospects and keep their outreach organized. I wanted to see if this is something your team might be open to exploring.

scripts.title: Confirmation Steps
scripts.content: Thanks for your time today. Before we wrap up, I want to make sure I captured everything correctly. I’m going to send you a quick recap and follow up with the next steps so you have everything in one place.

scripts.title: I’m Not Interested
scripts.content: I understand. I’m not trying to force anything. I’m simply reaching out because we help practices improve their process and stay more consistent with outbound outreach. If it becomes relevant later, I’d be happy to revisit it.

scripts.title: Social Media Referral Network
scripts.content: That makes sense. We’re not trying to replace anything you’re already doing. We’re simply offering another referral channel that can support your current efforts and add more visibility.

scripts.title: I’m Not Interested (Second Time)
scripts.content: I hear you. I’ll leave it there for now. If your priorities change down the road, feel free to reach out and I’ll be happy to share more information.

scripts.title: Paid Thing
scripts.content: I understand. We do not ask for any upfront payment or long-term commitment to get started. We simply want to show you the value first and let you decide if it’s a fit.

scripts.title: Send Me an Email
scripts.content: Absolutely, I can send over a short overview. I’ll send it to you now so you can review it at your convenience.

scripts.title: I’m Not Doing Anything Until You Send Something
scripts.content: That’s fair. I can send a short summary right away so you have something concrete to review and evaluate.

scripts.title: Office Manager
scripts.content: Totally understand. If the office manager is the right point of contact, I’m happy to speak with them directly and keep it brief.

scripts.title: How Does It Work
scripts.content: The process is pretty straightforward. We identify opportunities, make a light introduction, and then let the team decide if it’s a fit.

scripts.title: Why Are You Doing This
scripts.content: We’re reaching out because we help practices streamline outreach and create better conversations with patients and referral partners.

scripts.title: How Did You Select Me
scripts.content: We generally look for practices that are growing, have a strong patient base, and are open to exploring smarter ways to stay in front of new opportunities.

scripts.title: 5 Point Metric System
scripts.content: We use a simple five-point metric system to measure fit and relevance so we only bring forward opportunities that make sense.

scripts.title: Cell Phone Number
scripts.content: I understand. I can send the information to your office number or direct it to the contact method you prefer.

scripts.title: I Already Have Facebook
scripts.content: That’s great. We’re not trying to replace your current channels. We’re simply adding another layer of visibility and referral support.

scripts.title: Call Me in Two Weeks
scripts.content: That’s fair. I can circle back in two weeks and keep the conversation light. If it’s useful, I’ll check in then.

scripts.title: Healthcare Research Division
scripts.content: Understood. We work with practices and healthcare teams that want more efficient outreach and stronger visibility in the market.

scripts.title: Driving During Interview
scripts.content: I understand. I can keep this brief and send the information over so you can review it when it’s convenient.

scripts.title: Are You Facebook or Third Party
scripts.content: We’re not a social media platform and we’re not a third-party lead vendor. We’re a service that helps practices improve outreach and conversion opportunities.

scripts.title: Other Practices
scripts.content: We work with many practices, but we always tailor the conversation based on your current goals and the opportunities you’re trying to unlock.

scripts.title: How Do You Make Money
scripts.content: We make money through a simple service model that aligns with the outcomes we help deliver. We’re focused on value and results, not pressure.

scripts.title: Call Me Back
scripts.content: Absolutely. I’ll note your preference and follow up at the time you requested so it’s convenient for you.

scripts.title: Purpose of the Call
scripts.content: The purpose of my call is simple: to introduce a service that helps practices improve visibility and reach prospects in a more effective way.

scripts.title: We Don’t Accept New Patients
scripts.content: Understood. In that case, this may not be the right fit. I appreciate your time and will leave you with the information we have available.

scripts.title: How Patients Find Practices
scripts.content: We help practices improve the way patients discover them and how they stay visible in a crowded market.

scripts.title: Holiday Script
scripts.content: Hi Dr. [NAME], I wanted to reach out during the holiday season to introduce a simple idea that may be useful for your practice in the new year.

scripts.title: Website
scripts.content: Absolutely, I can send you the website link directly so you can review it when you have a moment.
